title: Max Depth
documentation:
## Purpose
Limits how many levels deep a machine traverses when extracting or generating a document outline or hierarchical structure.

## When to use
Set this parameter on outline extraction, table-of-contents generation, or tree-traversal machines to control output granularity. A depth of 1 returns only top-level headings; higher values include nested subsections.

## Notes
Valid range: 1–10. A depth of 1 is the shallowest (top-level only). Deep outlines may be large; balance depth against the token budget of downstream machines. See [Inspection Depth](https://capdag.com/browse/media:inspection-depth;textable) for a qualitative depth control.
